title: Truth-Trace Verified Fact
description: Standardized metadata for anchoring AI reasoning to ground-truth evidence.

claim.description: The specific factual assertion made by the AI Agent.

provenance_type.description: The method used to verify the reality of the claim.

source_endpoint.description: The direct URL or API endpoint where the truth was fetched.

timestamp.description: The exact moment the fact was verified (prevents 'Stale Data' decay).

reasoning_entropy.description: The 0.12-bit entropy score at the time of assertion (Logic-Gated Verification).

integrity_hash.description: A SHA-256 hash ensuring the fact hasn't been altered by downstream agents.
